name: io.github.sqlsure/sqlsure
description: Semantic inspector for SQL: deterministic pre-execution validation that catches fan-out double-counting, summed averages, wrong join keys, and PII exposure — with machine-actionable fix hints so agents self-repair. 0.1 ms per check, offline, never reads data.

package_arguments.name: --model
package_arguments.description: Path to semantic model JSON (or use --manifest with a dbt manifest.json)
